mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYMENT_ORDER (ORDER_ID, RESERVATION_ID, USER_ID, ITEM_NAME, QUANTITY, TOTAL_AMOUNT, STATUS, PAYMENT_TYPE) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{reservationId}, #{userId}, #{itemName}, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{paymentType})
mapper.update: UPDATE PAYMENT_ORDER SET STATUS = #{status}, APPROVED_AT = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'APPROVED' THEN SYSDATE ELSE APPROVED_AT END WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT ORDER_ID AS orderId, RESERVATION_ID AS reservationId, USER_ID AS userId, ITEM_NAME AS itemName, QUANTITY AS quantity, TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, TID AS tid, STATUS AS status, PAYMENT_TYPE AS paymentType, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, APPROVED_AT AS approvedAt, FAIL_REASON AS failReason FROM PAYMENT_ORDER WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
